The research focuses on the role of Intrusion Detection and Prevention Systems (IDS/IPS) in strengthening Operating System (OS) protection against cyber threats. The attack mechanism involves various types of attacks, including:

1. Unauthorized access
2. Malware (e.g., ransomware)
3. Data breaches
4. Denial-of-Service (DoS) attacks
5. Sophisticated attacks that exploit vulnerabilities in OS

The impact of these attacks can be severe, including:

1. Financial losses
2. Reputation damage
3. Compromised customer data
4. Disruptions
